monday.description: Pan-seared oysters and trenette pasta are combined with sautéed watercress, finished with Sichuan chili oil.

tuesday.description: Fresh shrimp is stir-fried with diced poblano peppers and served over a bed of wild rice, seasoned with table salt.

wednesday.description: Roasted duck is served atop toasted crispbread with sautéed hijiki and a side of steak sauce for dipping.

thursday.description: Pan-seared scallops are served on toasted bagels with steamed drumstick pods and a dollop of low-fat ayran.

friday.description: Braised oxtail is shredded and served in naan bread with sautéed black truffle and a sprinkle of Cajun seasoning.

monday.description: Grilled mozzarella cheese is paired with sliced cucumbers and multigrain bread, served with a side of pizza sauce.

tuesday.description: Sliced parmesan cheese is served over a bed of glutinous rice, accompanied by steamed red bell peppers and a dollop of goat milk yogurt.

wednesday.description: Poached egg whites are served on toasted pumpernickel bread with sautéed cabbage and a sprinkle of sorrel.

thursday.description: Sliced robiola cheese is served over a bed of red rice, accompanied by steamed sea beans and a dollop of low-fat skyr.

friday.description: Morbier cheese is melted into a ramen noodle soup with sautéed napa cabbage and a sprinkle of furikake.
